name: iteration03-safearea-destruction
description: Verify safe-area geometry, touch targets, mission-control banners, Armory separation, focused wall ownership, regular rebuild countdown, collapse scatter, and responsive boss HUD.

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG
local b=root.Walls["Brick Wall"]
local stands={} local minSeparation=math.huge
for _,name in ipairs({"Boxing Glove Stand","Iron Knuckle Stand","Thunder Fist Stand","Titan Gauntlet Stand"}) do local s=root.Interactables[name] table.insert(stands,s.Position.X) minSeparation=math.min(minSeparation,(s.Position-b.Position).Magnitude) end
local respawnContract=true for _,w in ipairs(root.Walls:GetChildren()) do if w:IsA("BasePart") and w.Name~="Titan Server Wall" then respawnContract=respawnContract and w:GetAttribute("RespawnAt")==0 end end
local parts=0 for _,d in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("BasePart") then parts+=1 end end
return H:JSONEncode({parts=parts,stands=stands,minSeparation=minSeparation,respawnContract=respawnContract})

steps.label: Armory is separated and walls expose rebuild timestamps

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local U=game:GetService("UserInputService")
local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD
local function overlaps(a,b) return a.AbsolutePosition.X < b.AbsolutePosition.X+b.AbsoluteSize.X and a.AbsolutePosition.X+a.AbsoluteSize.X > b.AbsolutePosition.X and a.AbsolutePosition.Y < b.AbsolutePosition.Y+b.AbsoluteSize.Y and a.AbsolutePosition.Y+a.AbsoluteSize.Y > b.AbsolutePosition.Y end
local nonnegative=true for _,name in ipairs({"StatsPanel","ObjectiveCard","BossHUD","TargetWallHUD","GameMenu","MenuButton"}) do local d=g[name] nonnegative=nonnegative and d.AbsolutePosition.Y>=0 end
local banners={} local minHeight=999
for _,tab in ipairs({"Tasks","Settings"}) do g:SetAttribute("AutomationTab",tab) task.wait(.2) local b=g.GameMenu.Content:FindFirstChild("Hero City Generated Banner") banners[tab]=b and b.Image or "" for _,d in ipairs(g.GameMenu:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("TextButton") then minHeight=math.min(minHeight,d.AbsoluteSize.Y) end end end
local menuClear=not overlaps(g.MenuButton,g.StatsPanel) and not overlaps(g.MenuButton,g.ObjectiveCard) and not overlaps(g.MenuButton,g.MobileControls)
local compact=U.TouchEnabled or workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize.Y<520
local compactLane=g.TargetWallHUD.AbsolutePosition.X>=g.StatsPanel.AbsolutePosition.X+g.StatsPanel.AbsoluteSize.X and g.TargetWallHUD.AbsolutePosition.X+g.TargetWallHUD.AbsoluteSize.X<=g.MobileControls.AbsolutePosition.X and g.TargetWallHUD.AbsolutePosition.Y>=g.ObjectiveCard.AbsolutePosition.Y+g.ObjectiveCard.AbsoluteSize.Y
local laneClear=not compact or compactLane
return H:JSONEncode({insets=tostring(g.ScreenInsets),compat=tostring(g.SafeAreaCompatibility),nonnegative=nonnegative,minHeight=minHeight,menuHeight=g.MenuButton.AbsoluteSize.Y,menuClear=menuClear,laneClear=laneClear,tasks=banners.Tasks,settings=banners.Settings})

steps.label: safe-area, touch targets, combat lane, and tab graphics pass

args.code:
local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation
c:Invoke("Reset")
c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=20,WallLevel=1,TutorialStep=2,CritChance=0})
local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1]
p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(-2,7,-13)
c:Invoke("HitWall","Brick Wall")
return true

local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD
g.GameMenu.Visible=false task.wait(.2)
local hi=workspace:FindFirstChild("Local Target Highlight")
return H:JSONEncode({visible=g.TargetWallHUD.Visible,title=g.TargetWallHUD.TargetTitle.Text,context=g.ContextTarget.Visible,highlight=hi and hi.Adornee and hi.Adornee.Name or ""})

steps.label: live wall owns focus instead of Armory stand

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation
c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=60,WallLevel=1})
local r=c:Invoke("BreakWall","Brick Wall",10)
local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local w=root.Walls["Brick Wall"]
local minT=1 for _,d in ipairs(root.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"]:GetChildren()) do if string.find(d.Name,"Brick Wall Collapse Chunk",1,true) then minT=math.min(minT,d.Transparency) end end
return H:JSONEncode({broken=w:GetAttribute("Broken"),scheduled=(w:GetAttribute("RespawnAt") or 0)>workspace:GetServerTimeNow(),minChunkTransparency=minT})

steps.label: break wall with readable collapse start

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD task.wait(.05)
local pops={} for _,d in ipairs(g.RewardPops:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("TextLabel") then table.insert(pops,d) end end
local nonoverlap=true for i=1,#pops do for j=i+1,#pops do local a,b=pops[i],pops[j] local overlap=a.AbsolutePosition.X<b.AbsolutePosition.X+b.AbsoluteSize.X and a.AbsolutePosition.X+a.AbsoluteSize.X>b.AbsolutePosition.X and a.AbsolutePosition.Y<b.AbsolutePosition.Y+b.AbsoluteSize.Y and a.AbsolutePosition.Y+a.AbsoluteSize.Y>b.AbsolutePosition.Y if overlap then nonoverlap=false end end end
local toasts=0 for _,d in ipairs(g.Toasts:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("TextLabel") then toasts+=1 end end
return H:JSONEncode({pops=#pops,nonoverlap=nonoverlap,toasts=toasts,layout=g.RewardPops:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("UIListLayout")~=nil})

steps.label: level and reward feedback stack without duplicates
wait for collapse scatter and rebuild HUD

args.code:
local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local w=root.Walls["Brick Wall"] local maxSpread,minT=0,1
for _,d in ipairs(root.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"]:GetChildren()) do if string.find(d.Name,"Brick Wall Collapse Chunk",1,true) then maxSpread=math.max(maxSpread,math.abs(d.Position.X-w.Position.X)) minT=math.min(minT,d.Transparency) end end
return H:JSONEncode({maxSpread=maxSpread,minTransparency=minT})

steps.label: collapse chunks scatter away and fade
broken wall shows countdown without stale highlight

args.code:
local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation
c:Invoke("Reset")
c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=1000000,WallLevel=25,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0,FistMastery=1})
local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(82,7,15)
return c:Invoke("HitBoss").TitanHP

local H=game:GetService("HttpService")
local U=game:GetService("UserInputService")
local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g.GameMenu.Visible=false task.wait(.2) local b=g.BossHUD
local compact=U.TouchEnabled or workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize.Y<520
local compactClear=b.AbsolutePosition.X>=g.StatsPanel.AbsolutePosition.X+g.StatsPanel.AbsoluteSize.X and b.AbsolutePosition.X+b.AbsoluteSize.X<=g.MobileControls.AbsolutePosition.X and b.AbsolutePosition.Y>=g.ObjectiveCard.AbsolutePosition.Y+g.ObjectiveCard.AbsoluteSize.Y
local clear=not compact or compactClear
return H:JSONEncode({visible=b.Visible,title=b.BossTitle.Text,subtitle=b.BossSubtitle.Text,titleFits=b.BossTitle.TextBounds.X<=b.BossTitle.AbsoluteSize.X,subtitleFits=b.BossSubtitle.TextBounds.X<=b.BossSubtitle.AbsoluteSize.X,clear=clear})

steps.label: compact boss HUD fits safe combat lane
